creator: matias@pizarro.net
text:
This is the initial shar file.

The port ships with integrations for KDE, XFCE, Thunar, Konqueror, Nautilus, Nemo and:
 * installs icons
 * installs desktop entry
 * requires Linuxulator
 * installs ${PREFIX}/bin/bcompare that bootstraps the linux application
 * includes binary, config files, custom libraries and integration files 

passes QA
  - portlint: OK (looks fine.)
  - testport: OK (poudriere: 130amd64, 130i386)
  - portclippy: OK (all green)
  - portfmt -D: OK (no warning)
